'''Mon Halan''' was a high-ranking officer in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who fought in the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Halan defected to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] at the start of the [[Jedi Civil War]], along with other famed officers such as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath|Karath]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Derred]].

{{Char-stub}}
